grant_title: GSK IMPACT Awards for Greater Philadelphia
geographic_restrictions: Nonprofits serving Bucks, Chester, Delaware, Montgomery, and/or Philadelphia counties
project_area: Community health improvement, addressing factors such as community safety, education, employment & income, family & social support, housing & built environment, and nutrition & physical activity
demographic_requirements: None explicitly stated; focuses on community health impact and measurable outcomes
eligibility_summary: Nonprofits must have 501(c)(3) status, annual gross revenue of at least $100,000 (2024 and 2025), gross revenue not exceeding $5,000,000, and cannot be GSK customers or affiliates. Organizations must not designate more than 25% of annual operating expenses for patient advocacy, cannot have won a GSK IMPACT Award in 2023 or 2024, and cannot employ certain healthcare professionals.
